feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Are you giving up in your country?
entry.content: Me yeah I don't even see the point in going back to college at my age or even trying anymore >I will never have a family >I will never own a home >I will never have a wife >I will never have anything that makes me truly happy >I will never have friends >I will never have a good job >I am a useless ugly retard I am 23 and think I should throw in the towel and die in a hole

entry.title: /b/ Random: >Get my first ever debit card a month ago >Tell HR at part time job to swap from…
entry.content: >Get my first ever debit card a month ago >Tell HR at part time job to swap from deposit card they gave me to the debit card >Payday finally here after waiting a whole pay cycle >It went to the deposit card again WHAT THE HELL

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Project Hail Mary
entry.content: Had no expectations, and I kinda cringed at the first alien interactions. But sticking with it I fell in love. The comedy mostly landed, their friendship was believable and heartwarming, and the selfless acts they chose for each other stole the show. They could have gone into the science more, but it was already a 2.5 hour movie. Visually stunning and kinda sci-fi'ish, but sci-fi in a way that is family friendly cuz even your boomer parents and children can enjoy. What did /tv/ think?

entry.title: /int/ International: There are an infinite number of numbers. You can take those infinite numbers and…
entry.content: There are an infinite number of numbers. You can take those infinite numbers and slice them into an infinite number of infinite slices each of which can be sliced the same way ad infinitum. Then that must mean that there are not only infinite infinities, but an infinite number of those infinities. And an infinite number of those infinities. And an infinite number of those infinities. And…( infinitely times. And that infinitely times. And that infinitely times. And…) continues forever. And that c

They too were avoiding procreations and feminizing young boys to then abuse them

entry.title: /g/ Technology: New cpu from newegg - senytech. Scam or not?
entry.content: Just bought this cpu from newegg. It was just delivered. It's missing the top middle left and right resistors and was shipped in a cardboard box with a plastic tray. It was sent from seny tech on newegg. https://www.newegg.com/p/274-000M-0 01Y5?item=9SIC3U3KN44060& Did I get scammed or is legit? I looked up serial on amd and it says it's and oem or tray chip. I won't get my mobo until the 15th so I can test it yet. The substrate looks like the right color but many ledditors say seny tech is a sc

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Palworld 1.0 Release
entry.content: GET IN HERE the full release of Palworld drops soon. A fresh start is heavily suggested by the devs, but technically not needed. >what's in 1.0 release? Overhauled ALL major systems such as combat, movement, building, farming, bosses, etc. New areas and zones with their own undisclosed gimmicks and mechanics. A huge dump of new content in general including a fuckload of new pals. An actual story with an ending.

Like what Zeihan says, technology wise they're still basically India/Mexico brown shithole level, completely unable to innovate or to develop advanced technology.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Buy physical media, now. Companies will not give up their digital future. Sure s…
entry.content: Buy physical media, now. Companies will not give up their digital future. Sure some might but most will not. If you do not own the files physically, you dont own shit. >b-b-b-but I'll just put it on my NAS or HDD look I've been down that road. I still have discs with my childhood DVD photos that still load on them 18 years later. I dont own any of those storage devices anymore that I had.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: How to stop my sweet tooth?
entry.content: I just bought an 8count of those drumstick ice creams 2 days ago. I ate them all within 2 days. Now i want to go to the store to get more. Trying to resist the urge to go but its so strong and if i dont go today ill probably go tomorrow or saturday. Ive always had a bad sweet tooth but sometimes the craving is worse than other times. Matter fact before lately i hadnt bought ice cream for a good while, at least a couple months, but now the craving is back hard. If its not ice cream, then its choc

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why aren't you taking the Cloudpill?
entry.content: Why bother with a 4k$ PC when you can just stream 4k 120fps for 199$ with non existent latency. I got 1 year Geforce Now and it's quite amazing. Not an ad btw. Building your own PC is only going to get even more expensive and eventually priced out (for most it already is)

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Shmup players are more likely to be psychopaths
entry.content: I have a Bachelor's degree in Psychology. And for fun, I have studied and interviewed various shmup players over the span of a few years. And the conclusion? Shmup players are more likely to have psychopathic traits. I will list them. If I documented this shit online you will find out who I am and I do not want to be harassed. Anyways, I did this for fun. Anyways.. They have lots of emotional detachment when facing hundreds, if not thousands of bullets on screen. And for people chasing big clear

entry.content: what music do you listen to to hype yourself up while gaming, /v/? for me, it's DnB and breakcore (not the -ack!core shit) my current favorites i've got on repeat are: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AxJ sSmty-iM https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=etO q30rF0gE https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iP0 9CvxP0vs need more tunes to match this energy also this can be a videogame music thread, any recent games with good music come out? link or just say the game name and i'll listen

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The disc boycott is dead already
entry.content: >No disc versions for both games >The game and seasons passes are overpriced, ps plus subscribers get a discount >Post did not get ratio'd like their other posts, people whining about discs in the comments are getting bullied. >The ports are not available on xbox and pc. So those versions remain hacked to shit. $39.99 for both games, ps plus subscribers can get it for $19.99 until August 6th. Season Pass for each game is $29.99, ps plus subscribers can get it for $9.89 until August 6th.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1039
entry.content: /acrg/ - Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1039 "What's your type?" Edition Remember to SCREENCAP your links so we can laugh when they delete their posts. Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The best combination of Active and Passive biomods. Electric Discharge chases aw…
entry.content: The best combination of Active and Passive biomods. Electric Discharge chases away everything except leviathans, Water Secretion + Water Retention gives you infinite water, and Dermal Garden + Slow Metabolism gives you near-infinite food. If you get the fifth slot unlocked Camouflage or Sea Skimmer works, the former makes you invisible when you're still and the latter lets you zoom along any flat surface.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Little story from Uncle Anon
entry.content: 2024, almost 2 exact years ago, Argentina-Buenos Aires. Stunning, beautiful city. Immediatly amazed the architectonic wonders at every street I walked through. Women had bangs, the children looked healthy...but one thing caught my attention: Bolivians/Andeans I already knew besides the huge white population, there still are native-looking argentinians...but they weren't natives at all, since the bolivian indian looks different from the argentinian one. Bolivians are stocky, rough and somehow ani

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >July 2026 >I am forgotten
entry.content: >July 2026 >I am forgotten

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Rename the "smartphone"
entry.content: If you were to rename the smartphone, what would you call it? I use a smartphone as a music player, a camera, a note taker, a torchlight, an encyclopedia, a clock, a calculator, a dictionary, and a plethora of other functions. But not a phone. I would name it PVMT (portable virtual multi-tool).

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It seems like every other month for the past 5 years I've been hearing about how…
entry.content: It seems like every other month for the past 5 years I've been hearing about how the latest AI models are too heckin powerful and the permanent underclass will be decided by the end of the year. A cynic might argue that AI hype and fearmongering alike are just ploys to keep stock prices high and the bubble from popping. Not me though, I think 25% of all global investment going to AI companies is probably an excellent idea, and very sustainable.

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump airport name change sparks backlash in Florida
entry.content: https://www.aljazeera.com/video/new sfeed/2026/7/9/trump-airport-name-c hange-sparks-backlash-in-florida Palm Beach International Airport has officially been renamed President Donald J. Trump International Airport, with new signage installed throughout the terminal. The move has prompted mixed reactions, with supporters welcoming the tribute while critics argued it was ‘in poor taste.’

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nuking Physical: Sony wins big while you lose
entry.content: Sony cutting physical means: >saving money by not having to manufacture the discs >gaining profits from whatever they're turning the disc factories into >increasing profit margins by selling digital and cutting out the retailer cut >third parties also make more per sale >possibly pleasing the EPA by using less plastic All the while they will pass exactly ZERO of these benefits onto you. Prices will not reduce, infact they will increase, and Sony will have much better margins on those even higher
